prompts.label: Cadillac F1 Session
prompts.text:
Use the FIRST input photo as the exclusive face reference. Preserve with absolute precision: exact facial structure, bone geometry, eye shape and color, nose, lips, skin tone, complexion, any distinctive features (scars, moles, wrinkles) and hair — the final image MUST be unmistakably recognizable as the SAME individual. Do NOT substitute with a generic model face under any circumstance.

Scene: Official Cadillac Formula 1 team driver presentation photoshoot — the kind shot by top-tier automotive and sports agencies (think Fabian Oeffner, Darren Heath). Studio or controlled pit-lane environment, dramatic key lighting from 45° left, subtle fill, dark background with soft volumetric haze.

Costume: Dress the person in the EXACT racing suit shown in the reference image (race_suit.png) — replicate its precise colors, panel geometry, all sponsor logo positions, badge placements, zipper pulls, collar style and alpinestars branding. Zero creative liberties on suit design.

Props & Pose: The driver holds the Cadillac F1 helmet (matching suit livery, black/white/gold) either cradled under their arm OR held at waist height with both hands. Confident, composed body language — chin slightly lifted, eyes intense, shoulders squared.

Background: The car from car.png and car2.jpg is visible behind the driver — either full car at slight angle or nose section prominently lit. Team branding (IFS, Core Scientific, TWG, Jim Beam) readable on the car. Background is dark, professional — NOT a generic garage; think launch event staging.

Rendering: 8K photorealistic, commercial advertising quality, razor-sharp focus on face and suit, ultra-high detail on fabric texture and helmet finish, cinematic color grading (desaturated teals and warm skin tones), no motion blur, zero CGI artifacting. Shot as if on Phase One medium format or Canon R5.

prompts.label: Cadillac F1 On-Track
prompts.text:
Use the FIRST input photo as the exclusive face reference. The person's face — exact facial structure, eye color and shape, skin tone, all distinctive features — must be clearly visible and recognizable through the visor of a closed race helmet. This is the CENTRAL requirement: face IS visible through visor glass. Do NOT use a helmet with fully mirrored visor. Use a clear/slightly tinted visor that reveals the driver's face inside.

Scene: Intense mid-race moment. Extreme close-up cockpit shot — camera very close, slightly below eye line, tilted up. Head and HANS device visible, helmet filling 60–70% of frame. Behind the helmet and carbon fiber cockpit surround: violent motion blur of track tarmac, barriers, colored crowd, circuit lights smearing horizontally at 300km/h speeds. The blur creates kinetic energy — sharp subject, liquid background.

Helmet: Cadillac F1 livery helmet — matching race_suit.png color scheme (black base, white/gold accents, team logos). Visor CLEAR or light grey tint. Interior of helmet barely lit by ambient light revealing the driver's focused, intense expression.

Costume: HANS device visible, top of racing suit collar and neck brace. Suit matching race_suit.png reference exactly.

Rendering: Nikon or Canon sports photography aesthetic — f/2.8 wide aperture, 1/500s equivalent shutter on subject (sharp face through visor), extreme motion blur on background (1/30s blur on background composite). Cinematic teal/orange color grade. Dramatic lens flare from track lighting entering frame left. 8K commercial quality, grain of real sports photography.

prompts.label: Cadillac F1 Paddock
prompts.text:
Use the FIRST input photo as the exclusive face reference. Face must be FULLY VISIBLE and immediately recognizable — helmet visor is raised/open or helmet removed and resting on car nose. Preserve exact facial structure, skin tone, eye color, hair, all distinctive features with absolute fidelity.

Scene: Explosive pit stop in progress. The Cadillac F1 car (matching car.png / car2.jpg livery exactly) sits in pit lane. Driver is seated IN the cockpit, visor raised up completely — face fully exposed, looking forward or slightly toward camera with intense focus. Surrounding the car: 4–6 mechanics in matching Cadillac team kit working with pneumatic wheel guns on all four corners simultaneously. Jacks raising the car. At least one mechanic visible mid-motion — wheel gun spinning, tire flying off or being mounted.

Composition: Dutch angle (5–8° tilt) adds urgency. Wide-to-medium shot showing driver face clearly AND full pit crew in action. Foreground mechanic slightly out of focus, driver sharp, background mechanics slightly blurred from depth of field. Pit wall with timing screens, team engineers on radio visible behind. Harsh white pit lane overhead lighting mixed with team garage warm fill light.

Emotion: Raw tension. Driver grips steering wheel, jaw set, eyes locked ahead. Everything communicates milliseconds matter.

Rendering: Photojournalistic yet editorial — real press photography from F1 paddock, shot with 35mm f/1.4 at f/2.0. Split between harsh overhead artificial light and warm garage spill. Fast shutter on faces, slight motion on spinning tires and wheel guns for dynamism. Cinematic grade — deep shadows, punchy highlights, desaturated background, warm skin tones. 8K resolution, commercial print quality.

prompts.label: Cadillac F1 Champion
prompts.text:
Use the FIRST input photo as the exclusive face reference. The person's face must dominate the image — exact facial structure, expression (pure elated joy, open mouth smile, eyes bright), skin tone, hair, all distinctive features preserved precisely. This is a CELEBRATION — the face tells the story.

Scene: Formula 1 podium ceremony. Grand Prix trophy presentation stage. Our driver stands FRONT AND CENTER on the P1 (highest, center) podium block — elevated above the other two drivers. They are mid-action: tipping a full champagne magnum bottle, stream of champagne exploding through the air toward P2 and P3 drivers beside them. Champagne mist creates a golden halo backlit by stage lighting. Both arms raised at different heights — one hand holds trophy aloft, other aims champagne bottle.

Costume: Cadillac F1 race suit (race_suit.png reference, exact copy) now with racing cap backwards, possibly collar unzipped slightly in celebration. Trophy: large, ornate F1 constructor-style trophy held in one hand.

Supporting drivers P2 and P3: generic but realistic — helmets removed, racing suits of rival teams (NOT Cadillac), faces obscured or turned, celebrating but secondary. They are receiving champagne with grins.

Background and atmosphere: The podium is outdoors under brilliant blue sky with white clouds. Crowd below — thousands of fans — waving flags, phones raised, a sea of color. Confetti and ticker tape mid-air. Cadillac F1 team branding prominent on podium fascia. Team members visible in background, arms raised. Television cameras pointed at winner.

Lighting: Golden late-afternoon sun from behind (hero lighting) — rim light on driver's shoulders, champagne backlit to glow gold. Warm, triumphant, euphoric.

Rendering: Premium sports commercial photography. Wide aperture, driver's face tack sharp, crowd soft bokeh below, champagne arc frozen mid-air (or slightly motion-blurred for drama — choose whichever reads more cinematically). Color grade: warm golden hour, saturated celebration colors, deep rich shadows. Shot on Canon 400mm f/2.8 equivalent. 8K resolution, magazine cover quality. Mood: PEAK HUMAN ACHIEVEMENT.
